name: Deviled Crab Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sautee the chopped green pepper and parsley in a pan until tender. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the crabmeat, mashed potatoes, Old Bay seasoning, chopped eggs, onion powder, chopped green peppers, parsley, and beaten egg.
3. Shape the mixture into croquettes.
4. Roll each croquette in cracker meal to coat evenly.
5. Heat oil for deep frying until hot.
6. Deep fry the croquettes until golden brown.
Mrs. John P. Elberti
